app.name: MoldGuard
app.welcomeSubtitle: Please add a room to begin monitoring.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email address.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to start monitoring your spaces
signup.footer: By creating an account, you agree to our terms and conditions

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
errors.generic: Failed to create account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

success.title: Reset email sent
success.message: Check your inbox for the password reset link

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email address.
errors.generic: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

appliances.title: Appliance Control
appliances.autoDesc: Devices are controlled automatically by the ESP32 logic.
appliances.manualDesc: Manual override is active — you control the devices.
appliances.autoFooter: The ESP32 manages appliances automatically based on sensor readings.
appliances.manualFooter: Overrides are sent to the ESP32 on its next data push cycle.
appliances.thresholdsDesc: Set the humidity level at which each appliance activates automatically.

rooms.title: IoT Sensor Nodes
rooms.subtitle: Monitor all connected sensors in your mold prevention system
rooms.noDevices: No claimed devices yet. Go to {{deviceControls}} to claim your first ESP32.

edit.title: Edit Room
edit.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this room?

devices.title: Device Controls
devices.subtitle: Manage and control your connected devices and appliances

claimDevice.title: Claim a Device
claimDevice.description: Enter the Custom Device ID assigned on your ESP32 hardware via the captive portal setup. The device must have connected to the server at least once to be discoverable.
claimDevice.success: Device claimed successfully! It will now appear in your device list and room overview.

error.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to claim a device.
error.notFound: No unclaimed device found with this ID. Ensure your ESP32 is connected to Wi-Fi and hasn't already been claimed.
error.permissionDenied: Permission denied. The device may already be claimed or you are not authorized.
error.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

devices.noDevices: No claimed devices yet. Use the form above to claim your first ESP32 device.

reports.title: Analytics
reports.subtitle: Advanced insights and predictive analysis
reports.allRoomsSafe: Our predictive models indicate all rooms are perfectly safe.
reports.checkConsole: Verify console permissions if this persists.
reports.waitingData: Waiting for IoT hardware data limit(10)...
reports.alertDismissFailed: Failed to dismiss alert. Please try again.

settings.title: Data Management
settings.subtitle: Manage data, alerts, and system settings

general.title: General Mold Thresholds
general.safeLimitDesc: Humidity below this value is considered safe
general.criticalLimitDesc: Humidity above this triggers critical general mold alerts

blackMold.title: Toxic Black Mold Thresholds
blackMold.safeLimitDesc: Below this, black mold colonization risk is minimal

notice.title: 90% RH
notice.text: is the biological threshold for guaranteed {{organism}} growth and triggers a system override. Setting the critical limit above this value is not permitted.

alerts.title: Alert Preferences
alerts.enableDesc: Receive automated mold warnings via email

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.label: Receive email warnings for these risk levels
notifications.hint: Select one, multiple, or all risk levels. You will only receive emails for the levels you choose.

ripple.title: Click Ripple Effect
ripple.desc: Show wave ripple animation on click

validation.nan: All threshold fields must be valid numbers.
validation.integersOnly: All threshold values must be whole integers (no decimals).
validation.outOfRange: All threshold values must be between 0 and 100.
validation.generalOrder: General Mold: Safe Limit must be less than Critical Limit.
validation.blackMoldOrder: Black Mold: Safe Limit must be less than Critical Limit.
validation.maxCeiling: Black Mold Critical Limit cannot exceed 90% RH (biological ceiling for {{organism}}).
validation.fixBeforeSave: Please fix validation errors before saving.
